notes: Combines 'irgend-' (some-/any-) with 'wo' (where). Also: irgendwohin (to somewhere), irgendwoher (from somewhere).

sentences.german: Ich habe meinen Schlüssel irgendwo verloren.
Er lebt jetzt irgendwo in Südamerika.
sentences.english: He lives somewhere in South America now.

cloze_sentences.english: He lives somewhere in South America now.
